brand.name: Sunny Stack
brand.tagline: Big flavor, bright days, and burgers made fresh to order.

hero.eyebrow: Classic American flavor since day one
hero.title: Big flavor. Bright days.
hero.description: Juicy burgers, crisp ingredients, and good vibes made fresh for every table.
hero.imageAlt: Sunny Stack double cheeseburger with crisp vegetables and house sauce

signature.title: The Sunshine Double
signature.description: Two seared beef patties, American cheese, shredded lettuce, tomato, pickles, red onion, and our tangy sunshine sauce.
signature.imageAlt: Classic double cheeseburger on a bright table

dishes.title: Fan favorites
dishes.description: The classics you love, sunny sides, and hand-spun shakes made your way.

menu.title: Made for your mood
menu.description: Pick a favorite, swap the toppings, and make lunch exactly what you want.

items.name: Sunshine Double

story.title: Burgers bring us together
story.description: Sunny Stack started with a simple idea: good ingredients, big flavor, and a place where everyone feels welcome. From our kitchen to your table, we are here for the bright moments.
story.secondaryImageAlt: Friends sharing food at a restaurant table

gallery.title: A little sunshine
gallery.description: Colorful plates, casual tables, and moments made for sharing.

images.imageAlt: Bright cafe interior with large windows

items.quote: Everything is fresh and flavorful. The Sunshine Double lives up to its name.
items.name: Jessica Mora

items.quote: My kids loved it, I loved it, and the whole place feels genuinely cheerful.
items.name: Elliot Brooks

items.quote: The crispy chicken and lemonade might be my new perfect lunch order.
items.name: Nina Patel

contact.title: Come hungry. Leave happy.
contact.description: Order online, grab a sunny table, or call ahead for group lunches and easy catering.

footer.note: Fresh burgers, sunny sides, and friendly tables for the whole neighborhood.
